title: ATM Charter Invariants v0.1
description: Machine-readable list of framework-level invariants that no host project rule may override without a governed charter waiver.

charterVersion.description: SemVer version of the charter. Breaking changes require a charter waiver proposal.

projectName.description: Display name of the host repository (substituted from [PROJECT_NAME] template placeholder).

lastAmendedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the last amendment to this invariants file.

charterHash.description: SHA-256 hash of the companion atomic-charter.md at the time this invariants file was generated.

id.description: Stable identifier for this invariant. Never reuse a retired ID.

rule.description: Human-readable statement of what is forbidden or required.

enforcement.description: doctor: reported by atm doctor; gate: blocks promotion; waiver-required: needs charterWaiver + human review.

breakingChange.description: True when amending this invariant constitutes a breaking charter change requiring SemVer major bump.

rationale.description: Brief explanation of why this invariant exists.
